title: Ixora ravikumarii
taxonomy: Ixora ravikumarii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a member of the genus Ixora, which comprises about 400 species of tropical shrubs and small trees. The Rubiaceae family is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants, with over 600 genera and more than 13,000 species. This family is commonly known as the madder family or the coffee family, as some of its members are used for coffee production and other purposes. Ixora ravikumarii is native to the Western Ghats mountain range in India.
